name: Durg
safetyNotes: Use Durg as the road-trip origin and check highway conditions before departure.
sampleItinerary: Start early from Durg, keep the first day focused on covering distance, and plan an overnight halt before entering the long Madhya Pradesh stretch.

name: Gwalior
estimatedDailyCost: 1500-2500 INR per person; hotels around 2500-5000 INR per night
safetyNotes: Start fort visits early and avoid rushing if arriving after a long drive.
sampleItinerary: Arrive by evening, rest overnight, visit Gwalior Fort and Jai Vilas Palace the next morning, then continue toward Agra.

name: Agra
estimatedDailyCost: 2000-3500 INR per person; hotels around 3000-6000 INR per night
safetyNotes: Book Taj Mahal tickets from official channels and verify monument closing days before travel.
sampleItinerary: Visit Taj Mahal at sunrise, explore Agra Fort late morning, enjoy local food, and watch sunset from Mehtab Bagh.

name: Delhi
estimatedDailyCost: 2500-4500 INR per person; hotels around 3500-8000 INR per night
safetyNotes: Use metro or app cabs for easy movement and keep buffer time for traffic.
sampleItinerary: Spend one day in Old Delhi and central Delhi, then one day around Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb, markets, and food stops.

name: Goa
safetyNotes: Check sea conditions before water sports and avoid isolated beaches late at night.
sampleItinerary: Day 1 North Goa beaches, Day 2 forts and cafes, Day 3 South Goa, Day 4 waterfall or spice plantation.

name: Manali
safetyNotes: Snow routes can close in winter; check road and weather updates before traveling.
sampleItinerary: Day 1 Old Manali, Day 2 Solang Valley, Day 3 Atal Tunnel or local villages, Day 4 cafes and shopping.

name: Kerala
safetyNotes: Monsoon travel is scenic but can affect road movement and outdoor plans.
sampleItinerary: Kochi arrival, Munnar tea gardens, Thekkady nature, Alleppey backwaters, Kochi departure.

name: Jaipur
safetyNotes: Summer is very hot; winter is the most comfortable season for sightseeing.
sampleItinerary: Day 1 old city, Day 2 Amber and Nahargarh, Day 3 shopping and cafes.
